scenario.name: Traditional call 1001 to 1002
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:1002@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp 1001" <sip:1001@[remote_ip]>;tag=uac-1001-[call_number] To: <sip:1002@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=udp> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Automated traditional SIP acceptance call Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=1001 1 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=SIPp traditional call c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:1002@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp 1001" <sip:1001@[remote_ip]>;tag=uac-1001-[call_number] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:1002@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp 1001" <sip:1001@[remote_ip]>;tag=uac-1001-[call_number] To: <sip:1002@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:1001@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=udp> [authentication username=1001 password=__SIP_1001_SECRET__] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Automated traditional SIP acceptance call Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=1001 1 2 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=SIPp traditional call c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:1002@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp 1001" <sip:1001@[remote_ip]>;tag=uac-1001-[call_number] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:1002@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "SIPp 1001" <sip:1001@[remote_ip]>;tag=uac-1001-[call_number] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 3 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
